controls.control_objective: To ensure be known as the 'reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - account aggregator) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These directions shall be known as the 'Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Account Aggregator) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be known as the 'reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - account aggregator) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with effect on the day they are placed on the website of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
These directions shall come into force with effect on the day they are placed on the
website of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with effect on the day they are placed on the website of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to non-banking financial companies - account aggregators (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfc-aas' and individually as an 'nbf
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Account Aggregators (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFC-AAs' and
individually as an 'NBFC-AA').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to non-banking financial companies - account aggregators (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfc-aas' and individually as an 'nbf

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to an nbfc-aa: (1) reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - registration, exemptions and framework for scale based regul
controls.control_description:
The provisions contained in the following directions, where not contradictory to the
contents of these Directions, shall be applicable to an NBFC-AA:
(1) Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration,
Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be applicable to an nbfc-aa: (1) reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - registration, exemptions and framework for scale based regul

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfc- aa, despite the categorization of nbfc-aa as nbfcs-bl under sbr framework
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that the
provisions of paragraphs 12, 13, 17(1) and 18 shall be applicable to NBFC-
AA, despite the categorization of NBFC-AA as NBFCs-BL under SBR
Framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be applicable to nbfc- aa, despite the categorization of nbfc-aa as nbfcs-bl under sbr framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to an nbfc-aa in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant instructions contained in the directions mentioned in paragraph
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the above, the instructions contained in these Directions shall be
applicable to an NBFC-AA in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant
instructions contained in the directions mentioned in paragraph 4 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to an nbfc-aa in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant instructions contained in the directions mentioned in paragraph

controls.control_objective: To ensure always remain in the base layer of the regulatory structure specified in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - registration, exempt
controls.control_description:
NBFC-AA shall always remain in the Base Layer of the regulatory structure
specified in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration,
Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to always remain in the base layer of the regulatory structure specified in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - registration, exempt

controls.control_description:
(2) 'bank' means -
a) a banking company;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to - a) a banking company

controls.control_description:
or
e) such other bank which the Reserve Bank may, by
notification, specify for the purposes of these
directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , by notification, specify for the purposes of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure a banking company as defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949 (10 of 1949)
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Banking company' means a banking company as defined in clause (c) of
section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (10 of 1949);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a banking company as defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949 (10 of 1949)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by the reserve bank from time to time
controls.control_description:
(4) 'business of an account aggregator' means the business of providing
under a contract, the service of, retrieving or collecting such financial
information pertaining to its customer, as may be specified by the
Reserve Bank from time to time;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by the reserve bank from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
and
consolidating, organizing and presenting such information to the
customer or any other financial information user as may be specified by
the Reserve Bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the property of the account aggregator, and not be used in any other manner
controls.control_description:
Provided that, the financial information pertaining to the customer shall
not be the property of the Account Aggregator, and not be used in any
other manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the property of the account aggregator, and not be used in any other manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company registered under section 3 of the companies act, 1956 or a company registered under sub section (20) of section 2 of the companies act, 2013
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company registered under section 3 of the companies act, 1956 or a company registered under sub section (20) of section 2 of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure a 'person' who has entered into a contractual arrangement with the account aggregator to avail services provided by the account aggregator
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a 'person' who has entered into a contractual arrangement with the account aggregator to avail services provided by the account aggregator

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company which has been granted a certificate of registration under sub-section (1a) of section 12 of the securities and exchange board of india act
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company which has been granted a certificate of registration under sub-section (1a) of section 12 of the securities and exchange board of india act

controls.control_objective: To ensure a person registered under sub-section (1a) of section 12 of the securities and exchange board of india act, 1992
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a person registered under sub-section (1a) of section 12 of the securities and exchange board of india act, 1992

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide financial information on government securities held by retail investors in their retail direct gilt accounts under retail direct scheme
controls.control_description:
(9) 'Financial Information' means information in respect of the following with
financial information providers:
Note: Clearing Corporation of India Limited shall provide financial
information on Government Securities held by retail investors in their
Retail Direct Gilt accounts under Retail Direct Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide financial information on government securities held by retail investors in their retail direct gilt accounts under retail direct scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure an entity registered with and regulated by any financial sector regulator
controls.control_description:
(12) 'Financial Information User' means an entity registered with and
regulated by any financial sector regulator;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an entity registered with and regulated by any financial sector regulator

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company formed under the companies act, 1956 and which has been granted a certificate of registration by insurance regulatory and development author
controls.control_description:
(13) 'Insurance Repository' means a company formed under the Companies
Act, 1956 and which has been granted a certificate of registration by
Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI) for
maintaining data of insurance policies in electronic form on behalf of
insurers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company formed under the companies act, 1956 and which has been granted a certificate of registration by insurance regulatory and development author

controls.control_objective: To ensure the ratio of the outside liabilities excluding borrowings/ loans from the group entities to owned funds
controls.control_description:
(14) 'Leverage Ratio' means the ratio of the Outside Liabilities excluding
borrowings/ loans from the group entities to Owned Funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the ratio of the outside liabilities excluding borrowings/ loans from the group entities to owned funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company registered under the companies act and which has been granted certificate of registration by the reserve bank under section 45ia of the act
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company registered under the companies act and which has been granted certificate of registration by the reserve bank under section 45ia of the act

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by the reserve bank for the purposes of these directions, from time to time
controls.control_description:
(xx) Any other information as may be specified by the Reserve
Bank for the purposes of these directions, from time to time;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by the reserve bank for the purposes of these directions, from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the reserve bank of india, securities and exchange board of india, insurance regulatory and development authority of india, pension fund regulato
controls.control_description:
(10) 'Financial Sector Regulator' for the purpose of these directions, shall
mean the Reserve Bank of India, Securities and Exchange Board of
India, Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India, Pension
Fund Regulatory and Development Authority and Department of
Revenue, Ministry of Finance;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the reserve bank of india, securities and exchange board of india, insurance regulatory and development authority of india, pension fund regulato

controls.control_objective: To ensure be identified by the reserve bank for the purposes of these directions, from time to time
controls.control_description:
(11) 'Financial Information Provider' means bank, banking company, non-
banking financial company, asset management company, depository,
depository participant, insurance company, insurance repository, Central
Recordkeeping Agency, Goods and Services Tax Network (GSTN),
Clearing Corporation of India Limited and such other entity as may be
identified by the Reserve Bank for the purposes of these directions, from
time to time;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be identified by the reserve bank for the purposes of these directions, from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them under the act
controls.control_description:
Words or expressions used in these directions but not defined herein but defined
in the Act, shall have the same meaning as assigned to them under the Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them under the act

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning assigned to them in the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
Any other
words or expressions not defined in the Act, shall have the same meaning assigned
to them in the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning assigned to them in the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place board approved policies and establish periodic review mechanisms to ensure sound processes and systems
controls.control_description:
The NBFC-AA shall put in place Board approved policies and establish periodic
review mechanisms to ensure sound processes and systems.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place board approved policies and establish periodic review mechanisms to ensure sound processes and systems

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: (1) no entity other than a company shall undertake the business of an account aggregator
controls.control_description:
The registration requirements for an NBFC-AA shall be as under:
(1) No entity other than a company shall undertake the business of an Account
Aggregator.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: (1) no entity other than a company shall undertake the business of an account aggregator

controls.control_objective: To ensure commence or carry on the business of an account aggregator without obtaining a certificate of registration from the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(2) No company shall commence or carry on the business of an Account
Aggregator without obtaining a certificate of registration from the Reserve
Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to commence or carry on the business of an account aggregator without obtaining a certificate of registration from the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure , entities being regulated by other financial sector regulators and aggregating only those accounts relating to the financial information pertaining t
controls.control_description:
Provided that, entities being regulated by other financial sector regulators
and aggregating only those accounts relating to the financial information
pertaining to customers of that particular sector will be excluded from the
above registration requirement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , entities being regulated by other financial sector regulators and aggregating only those accounts relating to the financial information pertaining t

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a net owned fund of not less than rupees two crore, or such higher amount as the reserve bank may specify
controls.control_description:
(3) Every company seeking registration with the Reserve Bank as an NBFC-AA
shall have a net owned fund of not less than rupees two crore, or such higher
amount as the Reserve Bank may specify.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a net owned fund of not less than rupees two crore, or such higher amount as the reserve bank may specify

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet the net owned fund criteria within the period of validity of the in-principle approval for grant of certification of registration given by the re
controls.control_description:
Provided that, those companies not having a Net Owned Fund of minimum
of Rupees two crore at the time of seeking registration, shall meet the Net
Owned Fund criteria within the period of validity of the in-principle approval
for grant of certification of registration given by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet the net owned fund criteria within the period of validity of the in-principle approval for grant of certification of registration given by the re

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an application for registration on the pravaah portal to the department of regulation, mumbai of the reserve bank, in the form specified by the r
controls.control_description:
The process of registration as an NBFC-AA is as under:
(1) Every company seeking registration as an NBFC-AA shall make an application
for registration on the PRAVAAH portal to the Department of Regulation,
Mumbai of the Reserve Bank, in the form specified by the Reserve Bank for
the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an application for registration on the pravaah portal to the department of regulation, mumbai of the reserve bank, in the form specified by the r

controls.control_objective: To ensure require to be satisfied that the following conditions are fulfilled:-
controls.control_description:
(2) The Reserve Bank for the purpose of considering the application for
registration shall require to be satisfied that the following conditions are
fulfilled:-
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require to be satisfied that the following conditions are fulfilled:-

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a leverage ratio of more than seven
controls.control_description: (vi) The company shall not have a leverage ratio of more than seven.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a leverage ratio of more than seven

controls.control_objective: To ensure be served by the grant of certificate of registration to the account aggregator to commence or to carry on the business in india
controls.control_description:
(vii) That the public interest shall be served by the grant of certificate of
registration to the Account Aggregator to commence or to carry on the
business in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be served by the grant of certificate of registration to the account aggregator to commence or to carry on the business in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prejudicial to the public interest
controls.control_description:
(viii) Any other condition that may be specified by the Reserve Bank from
time to time, the fulfilment of which in the opinion of the Reserve Bank
shall be necessary to ensure that the commencement of or carrying on the
business in India shall not be prejudicial to the public interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prejudicial to the public interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure , after being satisfied that the conditions specified under sub-paragraph (2) are fulfilled, grant in-principle approval for registering as an nbfc-aa
controls.control_description:
(3) The Reserve Bank may, after being satisfied that the conditions specified
under sub-paragraph (2) are fulfilled, grant in-principle approval for registering
as an NBFC-AA subject to such conditions as it may consider fit to impose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , after being satisfied that the conditions specified under sub-paragraph (2) are fulfilled, grant in-principle approval for registering as an nbfc-aa

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place the technology platform, enter into all other legal documentations required to be ready for operations and report position of compliance
controls.control_description:
(5) Within the period of twelve months, the company shall put in place the
technology platform, enter into all other legal documentations required to be
ready for operations and report position of compliance with the terms of grant
of in-principle approval to the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to put in place the technology platform, enter into all other legal documentations required to be ready for operations and report position of compliance

controls.control_objective: To ensure , after being satisfied that the company is ready to commence operations and in compliance with the registration requirements, grant it a certificate
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may, after
being satisfied that the company is ready to commence operations and in
compliance with the registration requirements, grant it a Certificate of
Registration as an NBFC - AA subject to such conditions as it may consider fit
to impose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , after being satisfied that the company is ready to commence operations and in compliance with the registration requirements, grant it a certificate

controls.control_objective: To ensure cancel the certificate of registration granted to an nbfc-aa
controls.control_description:
(6) The Reserve Bank may cancel the certificate of registration granted to an
NBFC-AA , if such company -
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cancel the certificate of registration granted to an nbfc-aa

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 47 and 48 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - registration, exemptions a
controls.control_description:
The companies seeking Certification of Registration as an NBFC-AA shall refer
to the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 47 and 48 of Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration, Exemptions and Framework for
Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 47 and 48 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - registration, exemptions a

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide services to a customer based on the customer's explicit consent
controls.control_description:
The duties and responsibilities of an NBFC-AA are as under:
(1) NBFC-AA shall provide services to a customer based on the customer's
explicit consent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide services to a customer based on the customer's explicit consent

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the providing of services to a customer shall be backed by appropriate agreements/ authorisations between the nbfc-aa, the customer and th
controls.control_description:
(2) NBFC-AA shall ensure that the providing of services to a customer shall be
backed by appropriate agreements/ authorisations between the NBFC-AA, the
customer and the Financial Information Providers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the providing of services to a customer shall be backed by appropriate agreements/ authorisations between the nbfc-aa, the customer and th

controls.control_objective: To ensure support transactions by customers
controls.control_description: (3) NBFC-AA shall not support transactions by customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to support transactions by customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure appropriate mechanisms for proper customer identification
controls.control_description:
(4) NBFC-AA shall ensure appropriate mechanisms for proper customer
identification.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure appropriate mechanisms for proper customer identification

controls.control_objective: To ensure share information as referred to under paragraph 8(4) only with the customer to whom it relates or any other financial information user as authorised
controls.control_description:
(5) NBFC-AA shall share information as referred to under paragraph 8(4) only
with the customer to whom it relates or any other financial information user as
authorised by the customer in accordance with the terms of the consent provided
by the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to share information as referred to under paragraph 8(4) only with the customer to whom it relates or any other financial information user as authorised

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake any other business other than the business of account aggregator
controls.control_description:
(6) NBFC-AA shall not undertake any other business other than the business of
account aggregator.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake any other business other than the business of account aggregator

controls.control_objective: To ensure however be permitted
controls.control_description:
Deployment of investible surplus by an NBFC-AA in
instruments, not for trading, shall however be permitted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to however be permitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure reside with the nbfc-aa
controls.control_description:
(7) No financial information of the customer accessed by the NBFC-AA from the
financial information providers shall reside with the NBFC-AA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reside with the nbfc-aa

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the services of a third party service provider for undertaking the business of account aggregation
controls.control_description:
(8) NBFC-AA shall not use the services of a third party service provider for
undertaking the business of account aggregation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the services of a third party service provider for undertaking the business of account aggregation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accessed by the nbfc-aa
controls.control_description:
(9) User authentication credentials of customers relating to accounts with various
Financial Information Providers shall not be accessed by the NBFC-AA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accessed by the nbfc-aa

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a citizen's charter that explicitly guarantees protection of the rights of a customer
controls.control_description:
(10) NBFC-AA shall have a Citizen's Charter that explicitly guarantees protection
of the rights of a customer.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a citizen's charter that explicitly guarantees protection of the rights of a customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure part with any information that it may come to acquire from/ on behalf of a customer without the explicit consent of the customer
controls.control_description:
The NBFC-AA shall not part with any information that
it may come to acquire from/ on behalf of a customer without the explicit consent
of the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to part with any information that it may come to acquire from/ on behalf of a customer without the explicit consent of the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as correct
controls.control_description:
(11) In the event of any difference in position of financial information in the
statement generated by/from the NBFC-AA and the books of the Financial
Information Provider, the position as reflected in the records of the Financial
Information Provider shall be considered as correct.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as correct

controls.control_objective: To ensure be retrieved, shared or transferred by the nbfc-aa without the explicit consent of the customer
controls.control_description:
No financial information of the customer shall be retrieved, shared or transferred
by the NBFC-AA without the explicit consent of the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be retrieved, shared or transferred by the nbfc-aa without the explicit consent of the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure perform the function of obtaining, submitting and managing the customer's consent in accordance with these directions
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-AA shall perform the function of obtaining, submitting and managing
the customer's consent in accordance with these directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to perform the function of obtaining, submitting and managing the customer's consent in accordance with these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a standardised consent artefact which shall contain the following details, namely: -- (1) identity of the customer and optional contact information
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a standardised consent artefact which shall contain the following details, namely: -- (1) identity of the customer and optional contact information

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prescribed by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
and
(7) any other attribute as may be prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prescribed by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform the customer of all necessary attributes to be contained in the consent artefact as per paragraph 17 above and the right of the customer to fil
controls.control_description:
At the time of obtaining consent, the NBFC-AA shall inform the customer of all
necessary attributes to be contained in the consent artefact as per paragraph 17
above and the right of the customer to file complaints with relevant authorities in case
of non-redressal of grievances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform the customer of all necessary attributes to be contained in the consent artefact as per paragraph 17 above and the right of the customer to fil

controls.control_objective: To ensure also provide its customers a functionality to revoke consent to obtain information that is rendered accessible by a consent artefact, including the ab
controls.control_description:
NBFC-AA shall also provide its customers a functionality to revoke consent to
obtain information that is rendered accessible by a consent artefact, including the
ability to revoke consent to obtain parts of such information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also provide its customers a functionality to revoke consent to obtain information that is rendered accessible by a consent artefact, including the ab

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shared with the financial information provider
controls.control_description:
Upon revocation, a fresh
consent artefact shall be shared with the Financial Information provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shared with the financial information provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure be capable of being logged, audited and verified
controls.control_description:
An electronic consent artefact shall be capable of being logged, audited and
verified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be capable of being logged, audited and verified

controls.control_objective: To ensure share financial information of a customer with an nbfc-aa on being presented a valid consent artefact by an nbfc-aa in accordance with paragraphs 15 t
controls.control_description:
Financial Information Providers shall share financial information of a customer
with an NBFC-AA on being presented a valid consent artefact by an NBFC-AA in
accordance with paragraphs 15 to 21.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to share financial information of a customer with an nbfc-aa on being presented a valid consent artefact by an nbfc-aa in accordance with paragraphs 15 t

controls.control_objective: To ensure verify: (1) validity of consent (2) specified dates and usage
controls.control_description:
Upon being presented the consent artefact, the Financial Information Provider
shall verify:
(1) validity of consent
(2) specified dates and usage;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to verify: (1) validity of consent (2) specified dates and usage

controls.control_objective: To ensure digitally sign the financial information and securely transmit the same to the nbfc-aa in accordance with the terms contained in the consent artefact
controls.control_description:
Upon due verification, the Financial Information Providers shall digitally sign the
financial information and securely transmit the same to the NBFC-AA in accordance
with the terms contained in the consent artefact.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to digitally sign the financial information and securely transmit the same to the nbfc-aa in accordance with the terms contained in the consent artefact

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in real time
controls.control_description: All responses of the Financial Information Provider shall be in real time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in real time

controls.control_objective: To ensure : (1) implement interfaces that will allow an nbfc-aa to submit consent artefacts, and authenticate each other, and would enable secure flow of financ
controls.control_description:
To enable these data flows, the Financial Information Providers shall:
(1) implement interfaces that will allow an NBFC-AA to submit consent artefacts,
and authenticate each other, and would enable secure flow of financial information
to the NBFC-AA;
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to : (1) implement interfaces that will allow an nbfc-aa to submit consent artefacts, and authenticate each other, and would enable secure flow of financ

controls.control_objective: To ensure to verify the consent including digital signatures
controls.control_description:
(2) adopt means to verify the consent including digital signatures, if any, contained
in the consent artefact;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to verify the consent including digital signatures

controls.control_objective: To ensure to digitally sign the financial information that is shared by them about the customers
controls.control_description:
(3) implement means to digitally sign the financial information that is shared by
them about the customers;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to digitally sign the financial information that is shared by them about the customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure : (1) verify the identity of the financial information user
controls.control_description:
Where financial information has been provided by a Financial Information
Provider to an NBFC-AA for transferring to a Financial Information User with the
customer's explicit consent, the NBFC-AA shall:
(1) verify the identity of the Financial Information User;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : (1) verify the identity of the financial information user

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used or disclosed by an nbfc-aa or the financial information user except as may be specified in the consent artefact
controls.control_description:
Where financial information has been provided by a Financial Information
Provider to an NBFC-AA for transferring to the customer or to a Financial Information
User, it shall not be used or disclosed by an NBFC-AA or the Financial Information
User except as may be specified in the consent artefact.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used or disclosed by an nbfc-aa or the financial information user except as may be specified in the consent artefact

controls.control_objective: To ensure necessarily join as financial information provider also
controls.control_description:
With a view to ensure efficient and optimum utilisation of the Account Aggregator
ecosystem, regulated entities of the Reserve Bank joining the Account Aggregator
ecosystem as Financial Information User shall necessarily join as Financial
Information Provider also, if they hold the specified financial information and fall under
the definition of Financial Information Provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to necessarily join as financial information provider also

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the following: (1) business of an account aggregator will be entirely information technology (it) driven
controls.control_description:
NBFC-AA shall adhere to the following:
(1) Business of an Account Aggregator will be entirely Information Technology
(IT) driven.

controls.control_description:

officers or employees or other persons, of any NBFC-AA and at any intervals as it

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed prior
to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.control_description:

the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:

the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
